2603.16733.title: IQuest-Coder-V1 Technical Report
2603.16733.paper_summary: In this report, we introduce the IQuest-Coder-V1 series-(7B/14B/40B/40B-Loop), a new family of code large language models (LLMs). Moving beyond static code representations, we propose the code-flow multi-stage training paradigm, which captures the dynamic evolution of software logic through different phases of the pipeline. Our models are developed through the evolutionary pipeline, starting with the initial pre-training consisting of code facts, repository, and completion data. Following that, we implement a specialized mid-training stage that integrates reasoning and agentic trajectories in 32k-context and repository-scale in 128k-context to forge deep logical foundations. The models are then finalized with post-training of specialized coding capabilities, which is bifurcated into two specialized paths: the thinking path (utilizing reasoning-driven RL) and the instruct path (optimized for general assistance). IQuest-Coder-V1 achieves state-of-the-art performance among competitive models across critical dimensions of code intelligence: agentic software engineering, competitive programming, and complex tool use. To address deployment constraints, the IQuest-Coder-V1-Loop variant introduces a recurrent mechanism designed to optimize the trade-off between model capacity and deployment footprint, offering an architecturally enhanced path for efficacy-efficiency trade-off. We believe the release of the IQuest-Coder-V1 series, including the complete white-box chain of checkpoints from pre-training bases to the final thinking and instruction models, will advance research in autonomous code intelligence and real-world agentic systems.
2603.16733.paper_summary_zh: 在本報告中，我們介紹了 IQuest-Coder-V1 系列-(7B/14B/40B/40B-Loop)，這是一個新的大型語言模型 (LLMs) 家族。超越靜態代碼表示，我們提出了代碼流多階段訓練範式，通過管道的不同階段捕捉軟件邏輯的動態演變。我們的模型是通過進化管道開發的，首先進行以代碼事實、代碼庫和完成數據為基礎的初步預訓練。隨後，我們實施了一個專門的中期訓練階段，該階段整合了在 32k 上下文和 128k 上下文中的推理和代理軌跡，以打造深厚的邏輯基礎。然後，模型通過專門的編碼能力後訓練來完成，這一過程分為兩條專門的路徑：思考路徑（利用推理驅動的強化學習）和指導路徑（優化為一般性協助）。IQuest-Coder-V1 在代碼智能的關鍵維度上實現了與競爭模型的最先進性能：代理軟件工程、競賽編程和複雜工具使用。為了應對部署限制，IQuest-Coder-V1-Loop 變體引入了一種遞歸機制，旨在優化模型容量與部署佔用之間的權衡，提供了一條在效能與效率之間的架構增強路徑。我們相信，IQuest-Coder-V1 系列的發布，包括從預訓練基礎到最終思考和指導模型的完整白盒檢查點鏈，將推進自主代碼智能和現實世界代理系統的研究。
2603.16733.author: Jian Yang et.al.
